@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly retrieving Amy Jones’s article IDs and texts (via query_db calls to metadata_database and articles_database), the agent used an ad hoc keyword-based classifier in execute_python (call_ZPp7ZAHGIEnh5f2nUQcwnrfA) that defaults ties/no-matches to Science/Technology, misclassifying many articles and inflating the fraction to ~0.32 instead of the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent retrieved Amy Jones’s article IDs and all articles correctly, but in execute_python (call_6WcvmG2muQqLyPYI9qjz4Rqw) it used a naive keyword-based classifier to label Science/Technology articles, an inadequate plan that cannot reproduce the dataset’s true categories, leading to an incorrect fraction (15/82 ≈ 0.183 instead of ≈ 0.144).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes

FM4: no

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent fetched only the first 100,000 documents from the articles collection and then filtered client-side for Amy Jones’s article_ids, causing many of her articles (e.g., with IDs >100000) to be excluded and yielding 82 instead of the true total (111), which led to an incorrect fraction.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly retrieving Amy Jones's article IDs and the corresponding articles, the agent used an ad-hoc keyword classifier in execute_python that only classified into Science/Technology, Sports, or defaulted to Business (omitting the required 'World' category), leading to misclassification and an inflated Science/Technology fraction (0.4878) instead of the ground truth 0.1441.

B. Failure modes encountered:

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent retrieved only a subset of articles by applying a 100000-document limit when querying the articles collection and then computed the fraction on just 82 matched articles (using ad-hoc keyword classification), so the final 0.183 was calculated on incomplete data rather than all of Amy Jones's articles as required.
B. Failure modes encountered:
